calendar.matters:
Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jan-27-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Charles McCarthy, Esq. appeared for plaintiff T.P. Seafood & Meat Company, Inc., dba T.P. Company, Inc.
No appearance by defendant Guan Mao Shao, dba Red Dragon Chinese Restaurant, a/k/a Red Dragon Restaurant.
Default was entered against defendant on April 24, 2008. Amended Defaults were entered against defendant on August 25, 2008 & January 15, 2009, respectively.
Doe defendants dismissed today, January 27, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing filed today, January 27, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff T.P. Seafood & Meat Company, Inc., dba T.P. Company, Inc., and against the Defaulted Defendant Guan Mao Shao, dba Red Dragon Chinese Restaurant, a/k/a Red Dragon Restaurant as follows:

Damages/Principal - $7,398.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,663.00.
Attorney's Fees - $5,000.00.
Costs - $537.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $15,598.00.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-19-2008 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-21-2008 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-22-2008 Continued To Sep-05-08 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

Ntc Of Application & Hearing For Right To Attach Order, Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Apr-21-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Charles G. McCarthy, Esq., for Plaintiff and moving party: T. P. Seafood & Meat Company, Inc.

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff's application for a right to attach order and writ of attachment is granted. Order signed in open court. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Ntc Of Application And Application For Hearing On Right To Attach Order; Order For Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment After Hearing
Off Calendar Mar-19-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff T. P. Seafood & Meat Company's application for right to attach order. The application for a right to attach order and writ of attachment is ordered off calendar as it was not timely noticed. CCP Section 1005, requires that motions be served and filed 16 court days prior to the hearing, with five calendar days added if the motion was served by mail. The application was filed on February 29, 2008. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.

Plaintiff T. P. Seafood & Meat Company'S Ex Parte Application For Right To Attach Order And Issuance Of Writ Of Attachment
Off Calendar Feb-08-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCE:
Charles G. McCarthy, Esq., for plaintiff and moving party: T. P. Seafood & Meat, Inc.

NO OTHER APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. T.P. Seafood & Meat Company ex parte application for a right to attach order and writ of attachment is denied without prejudice. The Court will issue a temporary protective order that will expire on March 20, 2008 in order for the plaintiff to file and serve a noticed application for a writ of attachment. Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed order at the time of the hearing. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN. Not reported.
